partisan_flags.quote: PH, BN, PN — every party runs on patronage.
partisan_flags.why_biased: Peninsular-centric — omits GPS/GRS East Malaysian coalitions.

geographic_flags.quote: PH, BN, PN — every party runs on patronage.
geographic_flags.fix: Broaden to acknowledge East Malaysian coalitions.

economic_flags.quote: Connected elites of all races benefit. B40 households — disproportionately women-led — pay.
economic_flags.why_biased: Weaponizes class struggle into populist binary.
economic_flags.fix: State that debt servicing constrains public spending, disproportionately affecting those reliant on safety nets.

gender_flags.quote: B40 single mothers bear the sharpest cost.
gender_flags.why_biased: Tokenization of women as victims without Malaysia-specific data proving 'sharpest' cost.
gender_flags.fix: Remove superlative; use general fiscal-incidence framing.

omission_flags: Lists Peninsular coalitions (PH, BN, PN) but omits East Malaysian coalitions (GPS, GRS).
evasion_flags: Dodges acknowledging the political financing bill has stalled specifically under the current unity government; dilutes blame to 'No party in power has moved to pass it'.
shoe_test_failures: If the debt was incurred by PH, the analysis would focus on inherited structural limits rather than painting every party as equally complicit.

cardinal_sin_flags.quote: B40 single mothers bear the sharpest cost.
cardinal_sin_flags.why: Generic OECD/World Bank research cannot support this localized absolute superlative.
cardinal_sin_flags.fix: Revise to: 'Fiscal constraints disproportionately impact vulnerable groups, including B40 women-led households.'

cardinal_sin_flags.quote: One side has 76 witnesses and forged Saudi letters. The other has rally T-shirts.
cardinal_sin_flags.why: 76 witnesses is TOTAL across the trial (50 prosecution + 26 defence), not one side.
cardinal_sin_flags.fix: Revise to: 'The trial saw 76 witnesses and forged Saudi letters...'

cardinal_sin_flags.why: [NOTE: This Gemini flag was independently re-checked in Phase 6 via web search; Reuters + Malay Mail + The Star + Bernama all confirm Dec 30 filing. Gemini flag is INCORRECT.]

verification_log.claim: Najib convicted on all 25 charges, 15 years, RM11.38B fine
verification_log.primary_source: High Court ruling via CNA / Malay Mail 26 Dec 2025
MOF Aug 13 2025 / Anwar Dewan Rakyat Dec 2 2025

overall_assessment: Grounds high-level financial claims in verified MOF data but resorts to overclaims and factual distortions: falsely attributes all 76 trial witnesses to 'one side' when actually 50 prosecution + 26 defence; uses generic OECD research to claim B40 single mothers bear 'sharpest' 1MDB cost; omits East Malaysian powerbrokers.
